form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (27.18) when seventh over 460m at Warragul in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from eight starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: On debut at this trip. Last start finished sixth at this track over 435m in (26.39). Sure to run boldly.

formComments.comment: On debut at this trip. Last start finished sixth at this track over 435m in (26.39). Sure to run boldly.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Galloped in back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 435m at this track in a handy (25.00), beating Dr. Xanthic. Will find this a bit tougher, hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a solid 28.82 over 510m finishing second at this track. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 16 over 515m at Sandown behind Zipping Sigrid beaten 2.75 lengths (29.67). Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.
